response.justification: The candidate has relevant experience in software development and some exposure to AI and fintech, but lacks direct experience in agentic AI architecture and fintech infrastructure.
strengths: Experience with multiple programming languages and technologies
Familiarity with AI and machine learning concepts
concerns: Lack of direct experience in agentic AI and fintech infrastructure
No clear evidence of experience in scaling engineering teams
Limited experience in regulated or high-stakes commercial environments

key_factors.factor: Lack of direct experience in agentic AI
